# Crypto Vision News API

> Real-time cryptocurrency news and market intelligence API with 350+ endpoints.
> Pay per request with USDC via x402 micropayments. No API key signup needed.
> https://cryptocurrency.cv

Crypto Vision News aggregates crypto news from CoinDesk, The Block, Decrypt, CoinTelegraph, Bitcoin Magazine, Blockworks, The Defiant, and 300+ additional sources. All endpoints accept x402 micropayments (USDC on Arbitrum).

## Payment (x402)

All API calls require x402 micropayment. Prices: $0.001‚Äì$0.20 per request.

```javascript
import { payFetch } from "@x402/fetch";
const res = await payFetch("https://cryptocurrency.cv/api/v1/news", { wallet });
```

Or install the agentcash MCP server: `npx agentcash install`

Network: Arbitrum (eip155:42161) | Asset: USDC | Default price: $0.001

## Key Endpoints

### News & Content
- `GET /api/v1/news` ‚Äî latest articles from 300+ sources ($0.001)
- `GET /api/v1/breaking` ‚Äî breaking news ($0.001)
- `GET /api/search?q={keywords}` ‚Äî full-text search ($0.001)
- `GET /api/v1/bitcoin` ‚Äî Bitcoin-specific news ($0.001)
- `GET /api/v1/categories` ‚Äî news categories ($0.001)
- `GET /api/v1/sources` ‚Äî all sources with status ($0.001)

### Market Data
- `GET /api/v1/coins` ‚Äî top coins with prices and market cap ($0.001)
- `GET /api/v1/market-data` ‚Äî global market overview ($0.002)
- `GET /api/v1/trending` ‚Äî trending coins ($0.001)
- `GET /api/v1/fear-greed` ‚Äî Fear & Greed Index ($0.002)
- `GET /api/market/gainers` ‚Äî biggest gainers ($0.001)
- `GET /api/market/losers` ‚Äî biggest losers ($0.001)
- `GET /api/v1/exchanges` ‚Äî exchange data ($0.002)

### AI Analysis
- `GET /api/v1/sentiment?asset=BTC` ‚Äî AI sentiment ($0.005)
- `GET /api/v1/ask?q={question}` ‚Äî ask anything about crypto ($0.005)
- `GET /api/v1/forecast?coinId=bitcoin` ‚Äî AI price forecast ($0.005)
- `GET /api/v1/digest` ‚Äî daily market digest ($0.005)
- `GET /api/v1/narratives` ‚Äî emerging narratives ($0.005)
- `GET /api/ai/research?topic={topic}` ‚Äî deep research ($0.01)

### DeFi & On-Chain
- `GET /api/defi` ‚Äî DeFi protocol overview ($0.001)
- `GET /api/defi/yields` ‚Äî yield opportunities ($0.001)
- `GET /api/v1/dex` ‚Äî DEX volumes ($0.002)
- `GET /api/v1/whale-alerts` ‚Äî large transactions ($0.003)
- `GET /api/onchain/exchange-flows` ‚Äî exchange flows ($0.001)

### Derivatives & Trading
- `GET /api/derivatives` ‚Äî futures/options overview ($0.001)
- `GET /api/v1/signals` ‚Äî AI trading signals ($0.005)
- `GET /api/v1/liquidations` ‚Äî liquidation data ($0.003)
- `GET /api/funding-rates` ‚Äî perpetual funding rates ($0.001)
- `GET /api/v1/arbitrage` ‚Äî arbitrage opportunities ($0.003)

### Multi-Chain
- `GET /api/solana/*` ‚Äî Solana tokens, DeFi, NFTs, wallet data
- `GET /api/bitcoin/*` ‚Äî blocks, mempool, difficulty, addresses
- `GET /api/aptos/*` ‚Äî Aptos transactions, resources, events
- `GET /api/sui/*` ‚Äî Sui balances, objects, transactions
- `GET /api/l2/*` ‚Äî Layer 2 activity, projects, risk scores

### Social Intelligence
- `GET /api/social/sentiment` ‚Äî social media sentiment ($0.001)
- `GET /api/social/trending-narratives` ‚Äî trending narratives ($0.001)
- `GET /api/social/x/sentiment` ‚Äî X/Twitter crypto sentiment ($0.001)
- `GET /api/influencers` ‚Äî crypto influencer data ($0.001)

### Premium ($0.01‚Äì$0.20)
- `GET /api/premium/ai/signals` ‚Äî AI trading signals ($0.05)
- `GET /api/premium/ai/analyze` ‚Äî deep market analysis ($0.05)
- `GET /api/premium/whales/transactions` ‚Äî whale tracking ($0.05)
- `GET /api/premium/smart-money` ‚Äî institutional flows ($0.05)
- `GET /api/premium/stream/prices` ‚Äî real-time price SSE ($0.05)
- `GET /api/premium/pass/hour` ‚Äî 1hr unlimited access ($0.25)

## Discovery & Documentation

- [OpenAPI spec](https://cryptocurrency.cv/openapi.json): machine-readable, 350+ endpoints with x-payment-info
- [x402 discovery](https://cryptocurrency.cv/.well-known/x402): x402scan resource listing
- [Agent capabilities](https://cryptocurrency.cv/.well-known/agents.json): skills, workflows, payment info
- [Full LLM docs](https://cryptocurrency.cv/llms-full.txt): comprehensive reference with examples
- [API docs](https://cryptocurrency.cv/docs/api): human-readable documentation

## SDKs & Integrations

- **x402**: `@x402/fetch` (npm), `x402-client` (Python/Go)
- **MCP server**: Claude MCP integration (io.github.nirholas/free-crypto-news)
- **ChatGPT plugin**: via /.well-known/ai-plugin.json

## Repository

- [GitHub](https://github.com/nirholas/free-crypto-news): source code and issues
